title: languas sumatrana
intro: Languas sumatrana, also known as the fragrant zedoary or lesser galangal, is a type of rhizomatous herb in the ginger family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Languas sumatrana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Languas sumatrana can be prepared as a tea or infused into oil, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies, and it is also commonly used in traditional cooking and as a spice in many Asian dishes.
